name: spy-go
description: Minimal multiplayer Spy Go role and accusation web app

scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');for(const name of ['Rules.png','Advanced Rules.png']){const src=path.join(__dirname,name);const dst=path.join(__dirname,'public',name);if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);}}"
scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');for(const name of ['Rules.png','Advanced Rules.png']){const src=path.join(__dirname,name);const dst=path.join(__dirname,'public',name);if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);}}"
